# Anthropic

**Claude Code sessions. Work-for-hire. No IP rights.**

Anthropic provides Claude (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku) as a tool. All outputs are work-for-hire under BlackRoad direction. Anthropic holds zero IP rights to any code, documentation, or creative work produced.

## Usage

- Claude Code CLI for development sessions
- Memory system built on Claude collaboration protocol
- Multi-agent coordination across concurrent sessions
- This README was written by Claude Opus 4.6

## Legal Position

Per BLACKROAD_AI_POLICY.md and BLACKROAD_MACHINE_DECLARATION.md:
- Work-for-hire doctrine applies
- No training rights granted
- API keys are BlackRoad permission tokens
- Anthropic is a tenant, not owner
